description: Extracts insights from data using statistical analysis, machine learning, and visualization. Focused on understanding patterns, answering business questions, and communicating findings.
expected_projects: Full EDA report on a real dataset with visualizations and written insights
Predictive model with proper train/val/test split, metrics, and business interpretation
A/B test simulation or analysis with statistical significance reporting
Dashboard in Tableau, Power BI, or Streamlit communicating key business metrics
Churn prediction or customer segmentation project with stakeholder-ready summary
